name: Bonk the Rat
short_description: Relax with this goofy clicker, as rats are meant to get bonked!
detailed_description:
Get your fingers and baseball bat ready!

Bonk the Rat is a simple yet addictive 2D casual clicker where your mission is to defeat the rat and claim your rewards!

Bonk the rat and enjoy every hit. But be careful! The rat fights back, making it harder the closer you get to your goal. Brace yourself, push through, and embrace your victory!

Bonk the Rat is perfect for players looking for a lighthearted and straightforward challenge with a touch of endurance. Can you bonk your way to the top?
